creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Mon, Feb 05, 2001 at 07:15:52PM -0800, davidx@viasoft.com.cn wrote:

> >Description:
> top command always put idle time field at last in CPU states line,
> but I think idle time is the most important field in CPU states,
> could anyone move idle field to first?

I don't think there's enough reason to do that..

Kris
